description_long: This object is a single upright book placed on a flat, irregularly shaped surface that resembles a piece of light-colored wood or laminate with several organic cutouts and curves. The book stands vertically, with its front cover facing outward and partially visible, displaying a muted illustration that appears to depict a classical or pastoral scene. The book's cover is mostly beige or light brown, with some darker and lighter areas suggesting an aged or vintage appearance. The spine of the book is visible from certain angles, showing a similar color palette and possibly faint text or decoration, though details are indistinct. The surrounding surface is thin, with a wavy, almost abstract form and several holes, giving it a sculptural quality. The overall impression is of a book as a personal item, set atop an artistic or decorative platform, suitable for display in an urban environment such as a park, plaza, or public seating area.
description: A single upright book with a muted, vintage-style cover stands on a thin, wavy, light-colored platform with organic cutouts. The book's cover features a subtle illustration, and the platform has an abstract, sculptural appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen upright on the left side of the wavy platform, with its illustrated front cover partially visible and the platform's largest cutout on the right.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from behind, with its spine and back cover more visible, and the platform's cutouts and curves extending to the right.
description_view_2: The book is positioned near the top center, with the platform's irregular holes and edges prominent in the foreground.
description_view_3: The book's front cover is most visible, showing the illustration clearly, while the platform's wavy edge and a large cutout are on the left.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a muted, classical-style illustration that appears to depict a pastoral or historical scene with soft, earthy tones. The artwork is subtle and blends into the background, giving the cover an aged, vintage look.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light brown and beige, with faint, possibly decorative markings or text that are not clearly legible. The design is simple and understated.
